meaning: n.状态,情绪vt.<英>殴打,修补,整顿
examples: In fine fettle when she came back from her trip to the States.
Advanced veterinary practice kept your pirate parrots in fine fettle.
Amid all this innovation, you might think that the global technology industry was in fine fettle.
We met Alan and Norah Fettle from Limerick, and Jimmy and Janey McAllister from Limavady.
